en.title: Pi-Ramesses
en.extract: Pi-Ramesses was the new capital built by the Nineteenth Dynasty Pharaoh Ramesses II at Qantir, near the old site of Avaris. The city had served as a summer palace under Seti I, and may have been founded by Ramesses I while he served under Horemheb.
en.description: Capital of the ancient Egyptian 19th dynasty
